title: Best Pre-Primary Schools and Daycares Near Lebu for Families Who Just Relocated
excerpt: Lebu pre-primary schools and daycares: new resident guide, enrollment timing, commute from compounds, moving with toddlers, and settling families on Addis's southwest edge.
content:
Best pre-primary schools and daycares near Lebu for families who just relocated

Families move to Lebu for space and calmer compounds—then discover pre-primary enrollment has its own logistics: waitlists, commute pins, and daycare hours that do not care about your unpacking chaos. Relocating with toddlers means sequencing the move, the lease, and the classroom.

This guide helps new Lebu residents evaluate pre-primary schools and daycares—what to ask, when to visit, and how moving day fits the calendar.

What to look for in Lebu pre-primary options

  • Proximity: Morning minibus traffic on Lebu connectors punishes long detours.
  • Hours: Align pickup with your commute reality—not brochure ideals.
  • Outdoor play: Compounds with dust need schools with maintained play surfaces.
  • Transition support: Some programs welcome mid-term arrivals with shadow days.

Visit before you sign the lease—if possible

Tour schools during active hours, not only Saturday open houses. Note noise, gate security, and how staff handle tearful drop-offs—your first week after moving will include tearful drop-offs.

Moving logistics with daycare-age children

Book movers mid-week when daycare is active so kids keep routine off-site. Pack comfort items in a dedicated carry bag—not buried in labeled cartons. Set up the child's room first even if the kitchen remains box stacks.

Enrollment paperwork and address changes

Update kebele-adjacent documentation and compound letters schools request. Photograph new address plates and utility bills early—admin offices move slower than trucks.

Building your Lebu parent network

Compound WhatsApp groups share honest daycare reviews faster than generic listings. Ask which schools run reliable holiday programs—critical for dual-income households still settling jobs.

Choosing Lebu-experienced movers

Crews familiar with Lebu gates and elevator rules reduce move-day chaos that unsettles toddlers. Right-size trucks—oversized rigs block family compounds longer than necessary.

Backup childcare on load day

Book a trusted sitter or grandparent slot—never stage moves around unsupervised toddlers.

Medical records transfer

Request pediatric files before move week—schools ask on day three when you are still finding scissors.

Conclusion

Lebu works for young families when school search parallels housing search—not after. Tour early, move with childcare off-site, unpack kid rhythm first, and lean on neighbor networks for the honest pre-primary shortlist.
author: Active Movers Team
